name: Turkey Breast'n Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Shake flour in the oven bag; place it in a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. Add gravy mix and water to the bag. Squeeze the bag to blend the ingredients.
4. Sprinkle turkey breast with salt and pepper; place it in the bag.
5. Place onions in the bag around the turkey.
6. Close the bag with a nylon tie; cut 6 half-inch slits in the top.
7. Insert a meat thermometer through one of the slits into the thickest part of the turkey breast, but not touching the bone.
8. Bake until the meat thermometer registers 170 to 175°F, 1¼ to 1¾ hours.
9. Let stand in the bag for 15 minutes before slicing.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
